mapper.update:
UPDATE xm_project SET is_delete = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_reason = #{deleteReason}, delete_time = NOW() WHERE
id IN
#{item}
1 = 0
mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM xm_project a LEFT JOIN xm_person_course_relate b ON a.id = b.project_id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND b.person_id = #{personId} AND b.is_sign != 3 ORDER BY b.update_time DESC

SELECT SUM(IFNULL(learn_hours, 0)) AS totalCourseHours FROM xm_courseware a LEFT JOIN xm_course_relation_courseware b ON a.id = b.courseware_id WHERE b.course_id IN (SELECT relate_ids FROM xm_project_relate WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND type = 2 AND is_delete = 0) AND a.is_delete = 0
